title: Tu Khara Mun Chhai
subTitle: Manini aspires to become an actor, but is married off to Abhimanyu, a wealthy man. While they strive to cope with their different personalities, the couple also attempts to manage multiple relations.

title: Sathi Sata Janmara
subTitle: Archana's devotion to her marriage is tested when Savita's manipulations threaten to tear her and Dev apart, forcing her to fight for love against family pressures.
